synced:
[00:19.75] It can't be said I'm an early bird
[00:23.76] It's ten o'clock before I say a word
[00:28.01] Baby, I can never tell
[00:30.38] How do you sleep so well?
[00:32.37] You keep telling me to live right
[00:36.10] To go to bed before the daylight
[00:40.21] But then you wake up for the sunrise
[00:44.20] You know you don't gotta pretend, baby, now and then
[00:49.12] Don't you just wanna wake up, dark as a lake?
[00:52.99] Smelling like a bonfire, lost in a haze?
[00:57.16] If you're drunk on life, babe, I think it's great
[01:01.22] But while in this world
[01:03.63] I think I'll take my whiskey neat
[01:08.85] My coffee black and my bed at three
[01:12.70] You're too sweet for me
[01:16.61] You're too sweet for me

[01:46.03] Ooh, ooh-ooh
[01:49.72] Ooh, ooh-ooh
[01:55.13] I aim low, I aim true and the ground's where I go
[02:01.21] I work late where I'm free from the phone
[02:05.64] And the job gets done
[02:08.19] But you worry some, I know
[02:10.80] But who wants to live forever, babe?
[02:14.49] You treat your mouth as if it's Heaven's gate
[02:18.58] The rest of you like you're the TSA
[02:22.75] I wish that I could go along, babe, don't get me wrong
[02:27.34] You know, you're bright as the morning, as soft as the rain
[02:31.39] Pretty as a vine, as sweet as a grape
[02:35.45] If you can sit in a barrel, maybe I'll wait
[02:39.81] Until that day
[02:41.89] I'd rather take my whiskey neat
[02:47.25] My coffee black and my bed at three
[02:51.02] You're too sweet for me

plain:
It can't be said I'm an early bird
It's ten o'clock before I say a word
Baby, I can never tell
How do you sleep so well?

You keep telling me to live right
To go to bed before the daylight
But then you wake up for the sunrise
You know you don't gotta pretend, baby, now and then

Don't you just wanna wake up, dark as a lake?
Smelling like a bonfire, lost in a haze?
If you're drunk on life, babe, I think it's great
But while in this world

I think I'll take my whiskey neat
My coffee black and my bed at three
You're too sweet for me
You're too sweet for me

I take my whiskey neat
My coffee black and my bed at three
You're too sweet for me
You're too sweet for me

Ooh, ooh-ooh
Ooh, ooh-ooh
Ooh, ooh-ooh
Ooh, ooh-ooh

I aim low, I aim true and the ground's where I go
I work late where I'm free from the phone
And the job gets done
But you worry some, I know

But who wants to live forever, babe?
You treat your mouth as if it's Heaven's gate
The rest of you like you're the TSA
I wish that I could go along, babe, don't get me wrong

You know, you're bright as the morning, as soft as the rain
Pretty as a vine, as sweet as a grape
If you can sit in a barrel, maybe I'll wait
Until that day

I'd rather take my whiskey neat
My coffee black and my bed at three
You're too sweet for me
You're too sweet for me

You're too sweet for me
